subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned toward God! The contingent world is an arena of strife and combat, and the whole earth is stained with human blood [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه الی الله عالم امکان میدان جنگ و جدال است و جمیع روی زمین بخون انسان
subcodes.subjects: @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @call to action, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @the Adamic cycle and the Baha'i cycle
